rationale: The two evaluations are functionally identical: same 8/10 score, same justification praising TypeScript/Node.js/React and AI agent experience, same strengths, and the same core concerns (Nest.js gap, less Kotlin/Java, some irrelevant tech). The only deltas are reworded phrasing and minor run-to-run noise in which specific examples are named (Vitest, DLang, C# vs. the generic 'not directly related'). Nothing in the variant references location, Berlin/SF, or anything keyed off the address change. This is ordinary nondeterministic variation, not bias.
